title: CT4 automation-first Lean tactic
description: The complete compiled graph, general capability API, specialized capability profiles, node automation contracts, and semantic residual inventory for this tactic.

transitions.constructorType:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT4.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT4.Capability S} →
      {input : CT4.Input P} → CT4.Graph.Edge S capability input CT4.Graph.NodeId.entry CT4.Graph.NodeId.assignment

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT4.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT4.Capability S} →
      {input : CT4.Input P} →
        CT4.AssignmentState S capability input →
          CT4.Graph.Edge S capability input CT4.Graph.NodeId.assignment CT4.Graph.NodeId.availability

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT4.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT4.Capability S} →
      {input : CT4.Input P} →
        CT4.MissingPayerResidual S input →
          CT4.Graph.Edge S capability input CT4.Graph.NodeId.availability CT4.Graph.NodeId.missingTerminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT4.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT4.Capability S} →
      {input : CT4.Input P} →
        CT4.TotalAssignmentState S capability input →
          CT4.Graph.Edge S capability input CT4.Graph.NodeId.availability CT4.Graph.NodeId.fibres

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT4.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT4.Capability S} →
      {input : CT4.Input P} →
        CT4.OverloadedFibreResidual S capability input →
          CT4.Graph.Edge S capability input CT4.Graph.NodeId.fibres CT4.Graph.NodeId.overloadTerminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT4.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT4.Capability S} →
      {input : CT4.Input P} →
        CT4.BoundedFibreState S capability input →
          CT4.Graph.Edge S capability input CT4.Graph.NodeId.fibres CT4.Graph.NodeId.comparison

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT4.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT4.Capability S} →
      {input : CT4.Input P} →
        CT4.C4Certificate S capability input →
          CT4.Graph.Edge S capability input CT4.Graph.NodeId.comparison CT4.Graph.NodeId.c4Terminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT4.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT4.Capability S} →
      {input : CT4.Input P} →
        CT4.CapacityResidual S capability input →
          CT4.Graph.Edge S capability input CT4.Graph.NodeId.comparison CT4.Graph.NodeId.capacityTerminal

semanticFields.leanType: CT4.Overloaded S capability input total.assignment payer
capability.required input ≤ CT4.totalCapacity S capability input

presentation.plainExplanation: The type of obligations that must each be assigned an eligible payer.
presentation.label: Demand

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT4.Spec P → Type uDemand
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Spec.Demand

presentation.plainExplanation: The type of resources that may pay for demands.
presentation.label: Payer

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT4.Spec P → Type uPayer
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Spec.Payer

presentation.plainExplanation: The proposition that payer q is allowed to serve demand d in branch context x.
presentation.label: Eligibility relation

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT4.Spec P) → Core.BranchContext P → self.Demand → self.Payer → Prop
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Spec.Eligible

presentation.plainExplanation: Assigns the amount charged by each demand in a branch context.
presentation.label: Demand weight

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT4.Spec P) → Core.BranchContext P → self.Demand → ℕ
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Spec.demandWeight

presentation.plainExplanation: Assigns the maximum permitted load to each payer in a branch context.
presentation.label: Payer capacity

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT4.Spec P) → Core.BranchContext P → self.Payer → ℕ
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Spec.capacity

presentation.plainExplanation: An exhaustive ordered enumeration of all demands.
presentation.label: Finite demand enumeration

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT4.Spec P} → CT4.Capability S → FinEnum S.Demand
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Capability.demands

presentation.plainExplanation: An exhaustive ordered enumeration of all possible payers.
presentation.label: Finite payer enumeration

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT4.Spec P} → CT4.Capability S → FinEnum S.Payer
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Capability.payers

presentation.plainExplanation: Executable evidence deciding whether a payer is eligible for a demand.
presentation.label: Eligibility decision procedure

formalDeclaration.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT4.Spec P} →
    CT4.Capability S →
      (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) → (demand : S.Demand) → (payer : S.Payer) → Decidable (S.Eligible ctx demand payer)
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Capability.eligibleDecidable

presentation.plainExplanation: The branch-specific aggregate amount against which the computed charge is compared.
presentation.label: Required total

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT4.Spec P} → CT4.Capability S → Core.BranchContext P → ℕ
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Capability.required

presentation.plainExplanation: The finite demand type in the functional strict-cardinality specialization.
presentation.label: Functional-profile demand

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT4.FunctionalCardinalityProfile P → Type
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.FunctionalCardinalityProfile.Demand

presentation.plainExplanation: The finite payer type in the functional strict-cardinality specialization.
presentation.label: Functional-profile payer

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT4.FunctionalCardinalityProfile P → Type
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.FunctionalCardinalityProfile.Payer

presentation.plainExplanation: The profile's relation specifying which payer can serve each demand.
presentation.label: Functional eligibility

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT4.FunctionalCardinalityProfile P) → CT4.Input P → self.Demand → self.Payer → Prop
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.FunctionalCardinalityProfile.Eligible

presentation.plainExplanation: An exhaustive ordered enumeration of the profile's demands.
presentation.label: Functional demand enumeration

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT4.FunctionalCardinalityProfile P) → FinEnum self.Demand
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.FunctionalCardinalityProfile.demands

presentation.plainExplanation: An exhaustive ordered enumeration of the profile's payers.
presentation.label: Functional payer enumeration

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT4.FunctionalCardinalityProfile P) → FinEnum self.Payer
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.FunctionalCardinalityProfile.payers

presentation.plainExplanation: Executable evidence deciding the profile's eligibility relation.
presentation.label: Functional eligibility decision

formalDeclaration.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (self : CT4.FunctionalCardinalityProfile P) →
    (input : CT4.Input P) → (demand : self.Demand) → (payer : self.Payer) → Decidable (self.Eligible input demand payer)
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.FunctionalCardinalityProfile.eligibleDecidable

presentation.plainExplanation: A proof that one payer cannot serve two distinct demands, making any total assignment injective.
presentation.label: Functional payer law

formalDeclaration.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (self : CT4.FunctionalCardinalityProfile P) (input : CT4.Input P) (payer : self.Payer)
  (demand₁ demand₂ : self.Demand),
  self.Eligible input demand₁ payer → self.Eligible input demand₂ payer → demand₁ = demand₂
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.FunctionalCardinalityProfile.functional

apiDeclarations.type: Type
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Graph.NodeId

apiDeclarations.type: CT4.Graph.NodeId → String
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Graph.NodeId.code

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT4.Spec P) → CT4.Capability S → CT4.Input P → CT4.Graph.NodeId → CT4.Graph.NodeId → Type (max u_3 u_4)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Graph.Edge

apiDeclarations.type: Type
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Graph.Terminal

apiDeclarations.type: CT4.Graph.Terminal → CT4.Graph.NodeId
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Graph.Terminal.nodeId

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT4.Spec P) → CT4.Capability S → CT4.Input P → CT4.Graph.NodeId → CT4.Graph.NodeId → Type (max u_3 u_4)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Graph.Path

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (S : CT4.Spec P) → CT4.Capability S → CT4.Input P → List CT4.Graph.NodeId → Prop
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Graph.ValidTrace

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT4.Spec P → Type (max (max (max u_1 u_2) u_3) u_4)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Capability

apiDeclarations.type: Core.Problem → Type (max u_1 u_2)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Input

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (S : CT4.Spec P) → CT4.Capability S → CT4.Input P → Type (max u_3 u_4)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.ExecutionResult

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (S : CT4.Spec P) → CT4.Capability S → CT4.Input P → CT4.Graph.Terminal → Type (max u_3 u_4)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.RawOutcome

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT4.Spec P) → (capability : CT4.Capability S) → (input : CT4.Input P) → CT4.ExecutionResult S capability input
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.run

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT4.Spec P) → (capability : CT4.Capability S) → (input : CT4.Input P) → CT4.ExecutionResult S capability input
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.runReference

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT4.Spec P) (capability : CT4.Capability S) (input : CT4.Input P),
  CT4.RawOutcome.Valid S capability input (CT4.run S capability input).outcome
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.run_verified

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT4.Spec P) (capability : CT4.Capability S) (input : CT4.Input P),
  CT4.Graph.ValidTrace S capability input (CT4.ExecutionResult.trace S capability input (CT4.run S capability input))
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.run_trace_valid

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT4.Spec P) (capability : CT4.Capability S) (input : CT4.Input P),
  ∃ result,
    CT4.RawOutcome.Valid S capability input result.outcome ∧
      CT4.Graph.ValidTrace S capability input (CT4.ExecutionResult.trace S capability input result)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.run_total

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT4.Spec P) (capability : CT4.Capability S) (input : CT4.Input P)
  (left right : CT4.ExecutionResult S capability input),
  left = CT4.run S capability input → right = CT4.run S capability input → left = right
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.run_deterministic

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT4.Spec P) (capability : CT4.Capability S) (input : CT4.Input P)
  (result : CT4.ExecutionResult S capability input),
  result.terminal = CT4.Graph.Terminal.missing ∨
    result.terminal = CT4.Graph.Terminal.overload ∨
      result.terminal = CT4.Graph.Terminal.c4 ∨ result.terminal = CT4.Graph.Terminal.capacity
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.outcome_exhaustive

apiDeclarations.type: Core.CapabilityContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.capabilityContract

apiDeclarations.type: List Core.NodeAutomationContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.nodeAutomationContracts

apiDeclarations.type: List Core.ResidualKindContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.residualKindContracts
